input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule EV.6.5.8 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: ev.6.5.8
            TITLE: teams must be prepared to show spacing on team built equipment

            CONTENT:
            rule EV.6.5.8: Teams must be prepared to show spacing on team built equipment
EV.6.5.8 Teams must be prepared to show spacing on team built equipment 
For inaccessible circuitry, spare boards or appropriate photographs must be available for 
inspection.

final_answer: Teams must be prepared to show spacing on team built equipment EV.6.5.8 Teams must be prepared to show spacing on team built equipment For inaccessible circuitry, spare boards or appropriate photographs must be available for inspection.
